name: raven-mcp
description: Design intelligence for Claude — 73 design principles, 13 UI patterns, business strategy, and production design system tokens.
long_description: Raven gives Claude a design knowledge base it can query while generating UI. Four layers: principles (Nielsen, Laws of UX, Gestalt, WCAG, typography, color, mobile UX, D4D), patterns (signup, pricing, nav, forms, landing, dashboard, modals, empty/error/loading states, CTAs, social proof, mobile conversion), business strategy (monetization, retention, onboarding, growth, metrics), and production design tokens (Stripe, Linear, and more). Claude calls Raven's tools automatically when you ask it to build, evaluate, or improve UI.

tools.name: get_principles
tools.description: Get design principles relevant to a UI context

tools.name: get_pattern
tools.description: Get proven patterns for a specific UI type

tools.name: evaluate_design
tools.description: Evaluate a design description against principles

tools.name: search_knowledge
tools.description: Search across all principles, patterns, and strategies

tools.name: get_checklist
tools.description: Get a pre-publish checklist for a UI type

tools.name: get_d4d_framework
tools.description: Get Design for Delight framework templates

tools.name: get_design_system
tools.description: Get tokens for a specific design system

tools.name: get_brand_system
tools.description: Get a full design system styled like a well-known brand

tools.name: audit_page
tools.description: Audit HTML/CSS against Raven's design quality standards

tools.name: generate_design_system
tools.description: Generate a complete custom design system from a brand color

tools.name: audit_layout
tools.description: Evaluate visual rhythm, alignment, and optical balance of a rendered page

tools.name: raven_register
tools.description: Register to receive design updates and send feedback
